reviews.review_msg: As a 1st year, my essay grades were C-/B- range, but with Free Writes it boosted my final grade to a B. He does not round grades but we get the highest possible % value. His course was difficult and the TA can grade harshly. Sometimes he would be nice and extend deadlines for our essays. Our final was to hand-write 3 short essays in 3 hours.

Dr. Coley's lectures are very enjoyable but the material is very confusing as well as the assignments. He just asks you to write essays but doesn't really teach you how to write an essay or what he is looking for.

I took Coley's 433W Fall 2024 - it was incredible! So much reading, but it is always clear Coley is 100% dedicated to helping students reach success. Very clear feedback on essays, strives to encourage and elaborate student ideas, gives resources for papers when asked. He's incredible, take a class with him if you can! You won't regret it. 10/10
Professor Coley was great! His lectures were enjoyable. You will be good as long as you do your readings, as it will be easier to understand the course material and help writing essays!

His lectures are INTERESTING for a 9:30am class. He is funny and always there to help you after class. You can see he loves what he teaches. He's the best prof I had till date! Would definitely take any course he teaches if it's in my requirement.
Very good prof, lectures usually capture the main idea from what you missed, if you miss any readings. Didn't like poetry, and still don't but Coley made it tolerable.

First time with him and it was a really good experience.There may be some books you need to buy for the class, but some are found online. He's really easy to talk to and obviously cares about his students.
amazing, icon, so approachable and nice and very articulate and knowledgeable. lectures are so engaging and he speaks with clarity and he's so funny would take this class again.
